case_title: TSANG, SHEILA vs. SAHAN, MUHITTIN (MAX) et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SAHAN, MUHITTIN (MAX) TUNA, AKGUN (ALEX)
